reviews.review_description: your better off paying money for a real zombie game

developer_response.body:
Hello, friend! We're very sorry for the shortcomings in your gaming experience. Since then, we have rolled out numerous new updates for the game, including new zombie types and new guns, but most players are not aware of these changes.

We believe that once players learn about all these new additions, a large number of them will join the game and get to experience the core fun of it. Recently, we will hold in-game events to gather players and play together. Friend, you can invite more of your friends to join in and sign up for our official Discord server.

Only when the game has more players will even more people join, making it more enjoyable. In addition, we plan to launch a major update in the next two months—a brand-new game mode. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Amazing game but maybe add sprinting to the player and a server list so you can make your own private server but other than that amazing

developer_response.body:
Hello friend,
Thank you so much for your support of the game. We've added a lot of new content to the game, including new types of zombies and new firearms. However, many players are still unaware of these updates.

I believe that once players learn about these new features, a large number of them will join the game. We will be hosting in-game events soon to bring everyone together and play.

Friend, feel free to invite more of your friends to join the fun! Also, make sure to join our official Discord for discussions. Once the player base grows, more and more players will naturally be attracted.

Additionally, we have a major update planned for the next two months—a brand new game mode!

Stay tuned!

Hello, my friend. The official version is called VR zombie escape,

reviews.review_description: the game is amazing me and my friends love it but the zombies have so much health and I just cost so much ammo if the developer could lower the health would be amazing but other then that the game is amazing

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for enjoying the game. This is a two-sided competition, where even the zombie faction possesses significant power. Humans can eliminate zombie players by acquiring more effective weapons from supply boxes and will continue to  Increase the power of human weapons while also fortifying the defenses of the zombie camp. The goal is to establish a level playing field

A free zombie game that’s realistic and enjoyable I have so much fun playing this except the first time you login the controls are bugging then just leave and join the game again and then your good!

developer_response.body: Congratulations on enjoying this game, follow up. We will continue to update more new guns, new maps, and zombie characters, thank you！！
